lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਨੀ ਧਿਆਨੀ ਆਖਿ ਸੁਣਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: giaanee dhiaanee aakh sunaae |
lines.english: The spiritual teachers and meditators proclaim this.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਨਾ ਰਿਜਕੁ ਸਮਾਹੇ ਆਪੇ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਹੋਰ ਨ ਹੋਈ ਹੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sabhanaa rijak samaahe aape keemat hor na hoee he |2|
lines.english: He Himself nourishes all; no one else can estimate His value. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਅੰਧੁ ਅੰਧਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa mohu andh andhaaraa |
lines.english: Love and attachment to Maya are utter darkness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਮੇਰਾ ਪਸਰਿਆ ਪਾਸਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: haumai meraa pasariaa paasaaraa |
lines.english: Egotism and possessiveness have spread throughout the expanse of the universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਜਲਤ ਰਹੈ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਗੁਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਨ ਹੋਈ ਹੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: anadin jalat rahai din raatee gur bin saant na hoee he |3|
lines.english: Night and day, they burn, day and night; without the Guru, there is no peace or tranquility. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਸਚਾ ਪਾਸਾਰਾ ਹੋਰਨਿ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਨ ਹੋਈ ਹੇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: sachaa hukam sachaa paasaaraa horan hukam na hoee he |4|
lines.english: True is the Hukam of His Command, and True is the expanse of His universe. No one else can issue any Command. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਥਾਪਿ ਉਥਾਪੇ ਆਪੇ ॥
lines.translit: aape thaap uthaape aape |
lines.english: He Himself establishes, and He Himself disestablishes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਜੋੜਿ ਵਿਛੋੜੇ ਆਪੇ ॥
lines.translit: aape jorr vichhorre aape |
lines.english: He Himself unites, and He Himself separates.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਜਮ ਕਾ ਭਉ ਭਾਗੈ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee jam kaa bhau bhaagai |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, the fear of death runs away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਲਾਇ ਲਏ ਸੋ ਲਾਗੈ ॥
lines.translit: aape laae le so laagai |
lines.english: He alone is attached to the Lord, whom the Lord attaches to Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੁਰਬਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਸੋ ਮੇਟਣਾ ਨ ਜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: purab likhiaa so mettanaa na jaae |
lines.english: Whatever is pre-ordained by destiny, cannot be erased.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਮੇਲੇ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: aape mele mel milaae |
lines.english: God Himself unites those united in His Union.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਬੂਝੈ ਕੋਈ ਹੇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: antar sabad sadaa sukhadaataa guramukh boojhai koee he |5|
lines.english: The Shabad, the Giver of peace, dwells forever deep within the nucleus of the self. One who is Gurmukh understands. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਭਗਤਿ ਕਰੇ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸੇਵਾ ਹੋਈ ਹੇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: anadin bhagat kare din raatee guramukh sevaa hoee he |6|
lines.english: Night and day, His devotees worship Him, day and night; one who becomes Gurmukh serves Him. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਜਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: satigur sev sadaa sukh jaataa |
lines.english: Serving the True Guru, lasting peace is experienced.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਮਾਰਿ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਅਗਨਿ ਨਿਵਾਰੀ ਸਬਦੁ ਚੀਨਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਈ ਹੇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: haumai maar trisanaa agan nivaaree sabad cheen sukh hoee he |7|
lines.english: Subduing egotism, the fire of thirst has been extinguished; contemplating the Word of the Shabad, peace is found. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਆਇ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਸਭਨਾ ਕਾ ਦਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: aape aae miliaa sabhanaa kaa daataa |
lines.english: He Himself, the Giver of all, has come and met me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਵੈ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਮਿਲਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਈ ਹੇ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: anadin naam ravai din raatee mil preetam sukh hoee he |8|
lines.english: Night and day, he chants the Naam, day and night; meeting with his Beloved, he finds peace. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਤ ਆਖੀ ਸੂਝੈ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh hovai ta aakhee soojhai |
lines.english: But one who becomes Gurmukh, sees the Lord with his eyes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਇਆ ਕੁਟੰਬੁ ਮੋਹੁ ਨ ਬੂਝੈ ॥
lines.translit: kaaeaa kuttanb mohu na boojhai |
lines.english: One who is attached to his body and family, does not understand.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮਤ ਕੀ ਨ ਮੂਓ ਆਭਾਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: janamat kee na mooo aabhaagaa |
lines.english: That unfortunate wretch - why didn't he just die as soon as he was born?

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਧਾਤੁ ਦੂਜੈ ਹੈ ਲਾਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh dhaat doojai hai laagaa |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukh wanders distracted, attached to duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਤ ਜਾਤ ਬਿਰਥਾ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਨ ਹੋਈ ਹੇ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: aavat jaat birathaa janam gavaaeaa bin gur mukat na hoee he |9|
lines.english: Coming and going, he wastes away his life in vain. Without the Guru, liberation is not obtained. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਇਆ ਕੁਸੁਧ ਹਉਮੈ ਮਲੁ ਲਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: kaaeaa kusudh haumai mal laaee |
lines.english: That body which is stained with the filth of egotism is false and impure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਸਉ ਧੋਵਹਿ ਤਾ ਮੈਲੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: je sau dhoveh taa mail na jaaee |
lines.english: It may be washed a hundred times, but its filth is still not removed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਧੋਪੈ ਤਾ ਹਛੀ ਹੋਵੈ ਫਿਰਿ ਮੈਲੀ ਮੂਲਿ ਨ ਹੋਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: sabad dhopai taa hachhee hovai fir mailee mool na hoee he |10|
lines.english: But if it is washed with the Word of the Shabad, then it is truly cleansed, and it shall never be soiled again. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਚ ਦੂਤ ਕਾਇਆ ਸੰਘਾਰਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: panch doot kaaeaa sanghaareh |
lines.english: The five demons destroy the body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਰਿ ਮਰਿ ਜੰਮਹਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਨ ਵੀਚਾਰਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: mar mar jameh sabad na veechaareh |
lines.english: He dies and dies again, only to be reincarnated; he does not contemplate the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹ ਗੁਬਾਰਾ ਜਿਉ ਸੁਪਨੈ ਸੁਧਿ ਨ ਹੋਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: antar maaeaa moh gubaaraa jiau supanai sudh na hoee he |11|
lines.english: The darkness of emotional attachment to Maya is within his inner being; as if in a dream, he does not understand. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਆਇ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਵਡਭਾਗੇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur aae miliaa vaddabhaage |
lines.english: They are blessed and very fortunate; the True Guru comes to meet them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਪੰਚਾ ਮਾਰਿ ਸਬਦਿ ਹੈ ਲਾਗੇ ॥
lines.translit: eik panchaa maar sabad hai laage |
lines.english: Some conquer the five demons, by being attached to the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਾ ਸੇਵਕੁ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਿਞਾਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: pooraa sevak sabad siyaapai |
lines.english: His perfect servant attains realization through the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਚਾਲ ਗੁਰੂ ਤੇ ਜਾਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: gur kee chaal guroo te jaapai |
lines.english: The Guru's Way is known through the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸਾਚੁ ਰਵਹਿ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਵੈ ਸੋਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: antar saach raveh rang raate sehaj samaavai soee he |12|
lines.english: Within the nucleus of their inner being, they dwell upon the Truth; attuned to the Lord's Love, they intuitively merge in Him. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਮਾਰੇ ਸਬਦਿ ਨਿਵਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: haumai maare sabad nivaare |
lines.english: Egotism is conquered and subdued by the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਰਵੈ ਘਟ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਰਸਨਾ ਰਸੁ ਚਾਖੈ ਸਚੁ ਸੋਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: sadaa sabad ravai ghatt antar rasanaa ras chaakhai sach soee he |13|
lines.english: Deep within his heart, he dwells forever upon the Shabad; he tastes the sublime essence of the True Lord with his tongue. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਖੈ ਉਰਿ ਧਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: har kaa naam rakhai ur dhaare |
lines.english: I have enshrined the Name of the Lord within my heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕਸੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਹਉ ਹੋਰੁ ਨ ਜਾਣਾ ਸਹਜੇ ਹੋਇ ਸੁ ਹੋਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: ekas bin hau hor na jaanaa sahaje hoe su hoee he |14|
lines.english: Other than the One Lord, I know nothing at all. Whatever will be, will automatically be. ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਬੂਝੈ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh boojhai sach samaaeaa |
lines.english: The Gurmukh understands, and is immersed in the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਹਜੁ ਕਿਨੈ ਨਹੀ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bin satigur sehaj kinai nahee paaeaa |
lines.english: Without the True Guru, no one obtains intuitive wisdom.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਸੇਵਿ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਚ ਰਾਤੇ ਹਉਮੈ ਸਬਦੇ ਖੋਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: sachaa sev sabad sach raate haumai sabade khoee he |15|
lines.english: He serves the True Lord, and is attuned to the True Shabad. The Shabad banishes egotism. ||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਦੇਵਹਿ ਪਕੀ ਸਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh deveh pakee saaree |
lines.english: The Gurmukh is given the winning dice.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਗੁਣਦਾਤਾ ਬੀਚਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: aape gunadaataa beechaaree |
lines.english: He Himself is the Giver of virtue, the Contemplative Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਵਹਿ ਸਾਚੈ ਸਾਚੇ ਤੇ ਪਤਿ ਹੋਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੬॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak naam samaaveh saachai saache te pat hoee he |16|2|
lines.english: O Nanak, immersed in the Naam, the Name of the Lord, one becomes true; from the True Lord, honor is obtained. ||16||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ਤੇ ਸਬਦਿ ਪਛਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: gur sevaa te sabad pachhaataa |
lines.english: Serving the Guru, through the Word of the Shabad, He is realized.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Maaroo, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਗਜੀਵਨੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਏਕੋ ਦਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: jagajeevan saachaa eko daataa |
lines.english: One One True Lord is the Life of the World, the Great Giver.
